description: A repository for Skyline, Strato, Vita3K and Yuzu Android compatible Adreno drivers.
A script for building turnip driver as an adrenotool package from mesa repository, scheduled releases per 2 week via github actions.
A script for building turnip driver as a magisk module from mesa repository, scheduled releases per 2 week via github actions.
A script for building turnip driver as an adrenotool package from mesa repository, scheduled releases per 2 week via github actions.
Highly unstable & sloppy AdrenoTools Turnip builds - use with caution. Targetted at better A8XX support.
